headline: Analyst shares 5 takes on the Neocloud vs Hyperscaler opportunities for Meta
summary: Inveting.com -- Meta’s (NASDAQ: META) new planned entry into the cloud business makes it a potential competitor to Amazon’s AWS (NASDAQ: AMZN), Microsoft’s Azure (NASDAQ: MSFT), and Google Cloud (NASDAQ: GOOGL). As the company considers two potential offerings, a hosted API/model access service comparable to AWS Bedrock and a neocloud-like raw silicon offering, Morgan Stanley analysts offer 5 takes exploring the monetisation pathways and potential of META’s announcement.

headline: Alphabet (GOOGL) Faces Final €4.1b Android Antitrust Ruling In Europe
summary: European Court of Justice upholds a €4.1b antitrust fine against Alphabet on its Android practices. Ruling is final and concludes a multi year legal dispute over Android market dominance in Europe. Decision increases regulatory pressure on Alphabet's core search and mobile ecosystems globally. For investors tracking Alphabet, ticker NasdaqGS:GOOGL, this ruling directly touches the foundations of its Android, search, and app distribution businesses. Alphabet runs one of the most widely used...
